metadata.title: grown-workspace FedRAMP Moderate Profile (thin import)
metadata.remarks: Thin selector. It imports the upstream GSA FedRAMP Rev 5 Moderate baseline (which itself resolves the NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5 catalog) by URL rather than vendoring the catalog. We include all controls from the upstream baseline; the subset grown actually addresses is documented in ../component-definition.json and ../../control-mapping.md, and the gaps in ../poam.json. NOTE: the import href is the canonical GSA/fedramp-automation path widely cited in FedRAMP docs, but live reachability could NOT be confirmed from this authoring environment (fetches returned 404, likely an environment/network/redirect limitation, since the sibling 800-53 raw URL did resolve). VERIFY the href resolves and pin to a release tag before use. UNVALIDATED.
